view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Appointment Reminder: Physical postcard sent 1 week before appointment for elderly patients without email.' However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on other functionalities such as booking and payment processes, but do not address the postcard reminder, indicating a gap in coverage for this requirement.
